title: Sonnet 5 is LIVE And It Competes With Opus
summary: Claude Sonnet 5 is a new LLM release from Anthropic that closes the performance gap with Claude Opus 4.8 on standard benchmarks. The video evaluates whether Sonnet 5 delivers equivalent real-world performance gains despite improved benchmark scores.
writeup: The video covers Anthropic's release of Claude Sonnet 5, a large language model that narrows the benchmark gap with Claude Opus 4.8. The central question is whether the improved benchmark scores translate into equivalent real-world performance, so Chase AI tests Sonnet 5 against Opus beyond the standard numbers. The takeaway is a comparison of the two models that distinguishes benchmark gains from practical capability.
